refnamediv.refpurpose: Estimate disparity with local stereo block matching.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: disparity = imstereobm(left, right) disparity = imstereobm(left, right, numDisparities, blockSize)

listitem.para: Rectified left and right stereo images with matching sizes.
Number of disparities to search. Default is 16.
Odd matching block size, at least 3. Default is 5.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Compares local blocks in a rectified left and right image pair and returns the disparity with the lowest absolute-difference cost. The macro is intended for small demonstrations and requires equal-sized images. Border pixels where the search window cannot fit are returned as zero.

refsection.title: Examples
